title: 0ptimized Chaos
description:
**The modpack is abandoned download an alternative from the author of Sodiuminus**

Hardly optimized with chips for solo/server play. This assembly is purely experimental and there will be a mountain of errors because the author will add more and more mods
body:
**The modpack is no longer supported in favor of Sodiuminus: https://modrinth.com/modpack/sodiuminus**

Hardly optimized with chips for solo/server play. This assembly is purely experimental and there will be a mountain of errors because the author will add more and more mods.

 **There is no Github because I'm too lazy to create it, but if you want to do something with it, then download and follow the MIT treatment** 

This mod is not the most stable but big enough for those who want optimization and some usefulness for the game.

**Do not pay attention to the strong difference between the versions in the game and in this one. I just finish the versions and post them right away, and if they need to be urgently updated, there will be updates. Speaking of versions, I number them very simply 1,2,3 and if there were changes, I add the number 1.6,2.3,5.8 in general, everything is very simple** 

Works only on beta and pre-releases of quilt, but will occasionally use a stable loader.

Version support:

| Version | Status |
|----------|----------|
|1.20.1|main|
|1.20|LTS|
| >main & LTS  | Not supported   |
